name: io.github.rwestergren/inbody-api-mcp
description: MCP server for InBody body-composition data — scans, body fat, muscle mass, body water

environmentVariables.name: INBODY_LOGIN_ID
environmentVariables.description: The phone number used to register your InBody account (digits only, no country code).

environmentVariables.name: INBODY_COUNTRY_CODE
environmentVariables.description: ISO country code selecting the regional API host (defaults to US).
